name: Formbricks Open-Source Survey API
what_it_does: Open-source survey and experience management platform with REST API — offering in-app surveys, NPS, CSAT, and user research forms with self-hosted option, as a privacy-first alternative to Typeform and SurveyMonkey with full data ownership.
use_cases: Triggering in-app surveys based on user behavior events via API
Retrieving survey responses programmatically for analysis and CRM integration
Managing survey templates and distributions from agent workflows
Building NPS and CSAT collection workflows with API-driven response analysis
Self-hosted user research platform for privacy-conscious applications
not_for: Complex statistical analysis and research tools (use Qualtrics)
Enterprise market research with panel management
best_when: A product team needs open-source in-app surveys with self-hosting option, privacy-first approach, and API access for response data integration.
avoid_when: You need enterprise research features, complex branching logic, or statistical analysis tools beyond basic NPS/CSAT.

auth.notes: API key from Formbricks account. Bearer token authentication. Environment-scoped keys for survey management vs. response collection. Self-hosted instances manage their own keys.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: unlimited surveys, 250 responses/month on cloud; self-hosted: unlimited
pricing.paid_tiers: Pro from $29/month; Enterprise from $99; self-hosted: completely free
pricing.notes: AGPL v3 open source — free to self-host with no limits. Cloud has generous free tier. Active development. Good alternative to paid survey tools. Privacy-first design.

performance.rate_limits: Self-hosted: no limits; Cloud: plan-based rate limits

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API covers surveys, responses, and people (user profiles). SDK for in-browser survey display. Webhook support for response events. Open source means code is auditable. API documentation comprehensive.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Response retrieval is idempotent. Survey creation/update operations are idempotent for same parameters. Response submission creates new records.
known_agent_gotchas: Self-hosted requires PostgreSQL and Docker — non-trivial setup vs. cloud
AGPL license — requires open sourcing modifications if distributing
In-app survey display requires frontend SDK — server-side agents cannot trigger UI surveys
Response data includes PII — handle with appropriate data protection

security_score_components.security_notes: AGPL v3 open source — fully auditable. TLS enforced on cloud. GDPR compliant with EU data residency. Self-hosted provides full data control. Environment key separation for security.
